scripts.predev: node -e "try{require('rollup/dist/native.js')}catch(e){console.error('Rollup native module missing. Run: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "try{require('rollup/dist/native.js')}catch(e){console.error('Rollup native module missing. Run: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json && npm install');process.exit(1)}"
